changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_policy_captures_metadata to k8s_audit_policy_metadata_captured for consistency with naming conventions
review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes as they relate to audit logging, which is a key aspect of Kubernetes security. The original function names mostly follow the naming conventions, but a minor adjustment was made to improve consistency. The functions accurately reflect the requirements of AU-12 (1) by addressing audit logging, retention, metadata capture, and time correlation.
naming_improvements: Ensure function names use past tense for actions completed, such as 'captured' instead of 'captures'
title: Audit Record Generation | System-wide and Time-correlated Audit Trail
step1_reasoning: The control AU-12 (1) focuses on generating a system-wide and time-correlated audit trail. In Kubernetes, this can be achieved through enabling audit logging, configuring log retention, ensuring audit policies capture necessary metadata, and enabling time correlation in logs. These functions ensure that audit logs are comprehensive and can be correlated across the system for effective monitoring and incident response.
